name: Execution Bias Fix
description: Appends a disambiguation rule resolving the tool_call-vs-plain-text-reply ambiguity in OpenClaw's built-in Execution Bias system prompt section, which was confirmed to trigger a decision-paralysis loop in Qwen3-4B-Thinking (see openclaw-rl/docs/issues_log.md, 2026-07-16/17 entries).
